title: Upload Tasks
description: Upload a CSV/TSV file containing multiple tasks for a squid

content.introduction: This endpoint allows you to upload a file (CSV/TSV) containing multiple tasks for a specific squid. The file should contain task parameters in columns matching the crawler's expected keys. This is ideal for bulk task creation.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: CSV or TSV file containing task data. Column headers should match crawler parameter keys

parameters.name: squid
parameters.description: The hash ID of the squid to add tasks to

fields.description: Upload task identifier for tracking progress

headers.description: Must be multipart/form-data for file upload

proTips.content: Use the returned task ID with Check Upload Status to monitor the upload progress.
CSV column headers must match the crawler's expected parameter keys (e.g., 'url', 'city', 'activity').
Large files may take time to process. Always check upload status before running the squid.
TSV (tab-separated) files are also supported and may be easier to work with for URLs containing commas.

seo.title: Upload Tasks - lobstr.io API Documentation
seo.description: Learn how to bulk upload tasks from a CSV/TSV file using the lobstr.io API.
